network.title: Network & RPC
network.description: Configure your connection to the Steem blockchain
network.autoSelectionDesc: Automatically select the best available node
network.rpcNodeDesc: High-performance nodes provide a smoother experience

media.title: Media & Content
media.description: Manage image hosting and content visibility

Communities.title: Communities
Communities.headerDesc: Explore and join vibrant communities on Steem. Manage your subscriptions and keep up with what matters most to you.

hero.subtitle: Empowering Your Voice
hero.description: Experience a social network empowered by the Steem blockchain. Explore trending discussions and share your unique perspective on a truly decentralized platform.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: SteemPro aims to bridge the gap between complex blockchain technology and everyday social interaction. We believe in providing a seamless, fast, and secure interface for users to interact with the Steem ecosystem.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Designed for both newcomers and blockchain enthusiasts.
features.feature1Desc: Connect with users worldwide on a censorship-resistant network.
features.feature2Desc: Lightning fast data fetching powered by Steem Data Service.
features.feature3Desc: You own your account, your keys, and your content.
features.feature4Desc: Built for the community, by the community.

cta.title: Join the Future of Social Media
cta.description: Be part of a decentralized world where your content is yours and your voice matters.

Explorer.title: Blockchain Explorer
Explorer.description: Real-time Steem blockchain data, blocks, transactions & chain stats

landing.heroDescription: Welcome to the ultimate blockchain gaming destination. Test your skills, climb the leaderboards, and win rewards in the Steem ecosystem.
landing.noGamesDescription: We're currently developing new titles for this category. Stay tuned!
landing.communityDescription: Explore amazing games developed by the Steem community and partner studios.
landing.buildYourOwn: Build your own game and showcase it on SteemPro Gaming Zone.
landing.fairPlayDescription: All high scores and game achievements are recorded directly on the Steem blockchain. This ensures transparency, immutability, and proof of skill. Top performers are eligible for curated rewards from the SteemPro community.

developerTemplate.title: Developer Integration Template
developerTemplate.description: Add your game to the ecosystem by following this data structure. Submit your PR or contact the team to get listed.

info.description: Scale the skyline with unwavering focus. Align each block with surgical precision to reach record-breaking altitudes. In this climb, focus is your greatest power.

global.concluded: Season {season} ascent has concluded. The final altitude records are now locked.
global.preparing: No active climb is currently running. We are preparing the next big height, get your focus ready!
global.beFirst: Be the first to scale the heights!
global.noMore: No more climbers in this range.

goal.title: Community Global Goal
goal.tooltip: Community rewards are calculated from the total combined altitude of all players. Every {stepSize}m beyond {baseAltitude}m adds {boost} {symbol} to the pool.

modal.title: Invite <climbers>Climbers</climbers>
modal.subtitle: Help break the community goal
modal.info: Copy this markdown and paste it in your next post or comment to invite friends. Higher collective altitude means bigger rewards for everyone!

daily.description: Push your limits daily to accumulate energy reserves for the laboratory.

daily_combos.title: Precision Master
daily_combos.description: Land total 10 combos in a day

daily.inactiveDescription: Challenges and Energy rewards are only available during active seasons. Stay tuned for the next climb!
daily.resetDescription: Energy is season-specific. Your balance for Season {season} will be reset when the season ends to ensure a fresh start for all competitors.

history.keepClimbing: Keep climbing! Reach {minAlt}m altitude OR {minPlays} plays with 10m+ altitude to qualify.
history.breakIntoTop: You're qualified! Now break into the Top {ranking} to secure your share of the pool.

publish.title: Share Your Journey
publish.subtitle: Publish your daily activity to Steem
publish.successDesc: Your climb has been immortalized on the Steem blockchain. Great job!
publish.supportDesc: By publishing your journey, you're not just sharing stats you're fueling the platform! Together, we give <pro>10%</pro> to support <steempro>SteemPro</steempro> and burn <burn>5%</burn> for the <eco>Steem Ecosystem</eco>. Your ascent helps everyone grow!
publish.defaultTitle: My Seasonal Journey on Steem Heights - {date}
publish.defaultBody:
![steem-heights.png](https://cdn.steemitimages.com/DQmTmKQbDgzjQnB4CFCMLemNa1hmo5bBt5C56GR9CtArCYN/steem-heights.png)

# My Seasonal Journey on Steem Heights 🏔️

I've been scaling the peaks! Here's my consolidated progress:

- 🚀 **Total Sessions**: {plays}
- 🏔️ **Personal Best**: {peak}m
- ☁️ **Accumulated Height**: {altitude}m (Est.)
- 🎯 **Total Combos**: {combos}
- 📈 **Average Altitude**: {avg}m

Think you can beat my score? Join the climb on Steem Heights!

[Play Steem Heights](https://www.steempro.com/games/steem-heights)

#steemheights #gaming #steempro #play2earn

winners.hallAwaits: The hall awaits its first hero...

lab.conflictToast: Cannot equip {skin}: It conflicts with your active {powerUp} power-up.
lab.conflictMsg: This ability is already active via your {skin} skin.
lab.skinsSub: Equip blocks with unique styles & abilities
lab.footnote: * Skins and Power-ups are seasonal perks designed to enhance your climb.
lab.footnoteSub: Temporary power-ups last for one game session only.

default.name: Classic Climber
default.description: The standard equipment for every mountaineer.

glacier.name: Glacier Plate
glacier.description: Frozen tiles that dampen movement speed. (150 Energy)

steel.name: Steel Core
steel.description: Heavy-duty tiles that ignore high-altitude winds. (300 Energy)

phoenix.name: Phoenix Wing
phoenix.description: Magical essence that saves you from one fatal fall. (500 Energy)

gold.name: Midas Touch
gold.description: Pure gold tiles that increase altitude on perfect drops. (1000 Energy)

wind_shield.name: Wind Shield
wind_shield.description: Ignore all wind drift for exactly one game.

slow_motion.name: Slow Motion
slow_motion.description: Movement speed is reduced by 20% for one game.

extra_gear.name: Extra Gear
extra_gear.description: Start your next game with one additional life.

canvas.loginToRecord: Login now to record your scores and earn rewards. Current altitude will not be saved.
canvas.seasonEnded: The current season has ended. Please wait for the next season to compete and earn rewards!
canvas.tapToDrop: Tap anywhere on the box to drop the block.
canvas.loginToRecordScore: LOGIN TO RECORD SCORE ON BLOCKCHAIN

howToPlay.title: Master the <climb>Climb</climb>
howToPlay.subtitle: Essential Survival Guide

dropControl.title: Drop Control
dropControl.desc: TAP anywhere to drop the moving block. Timing is everything.

precision.title: Precision Slicing
precision.desc: Blocks must land on the foundation. Overhanging parts are sliced off instantly!

perfect.title: Perfect Streak
perfect.desc: Aligning blocks exactly gives a PERFECT score. Increases combos and make less wind resistance.

bonus.title: Altitude Bonus
bonus.desc: Every successful combos grants a massive Altitude Bonus!

howToPlay.gravityDesc: You have <time>{timeVal} seconds</time> to drop each block. Taking too long triggers an <autoDrop>Automatic Drop!</autoDrop>
howToPlay.dailyDesc: Complete <challenges>Daily Challenges</challenges> to earn <energy>Energy</energy>. Use Energy in the Lab to buy <powerups>Power-Ups</powerups> and <skins>Skins</skins>.

Witnesses.title: Witnesses
Witnesses.description: Vote for witnesses who maintain Steem nodes and secure the blockchain. You can vote for up to 30 witnesses.
Witnesses.showOnlyVoted: Show only witnesses I've voted for
Witnesses.proxyActiveDesc: You are currently proxying your votes to
Witnesses.cannotVoteProxy: You cannot vote for witnesses while a proxy is active

proxy.title: Set Voting Proxy
proxy.description: Choosing a proxy allows another user to vote for witnesses on your behalf. This handles your full witness voting power.

myWitness.title: Witness Settings
myWitness.description: Manage your witness node properties and status.
myWitness.signingKeyDesc: The public key used to sign blocks.
myWitness.securityDesc: Changing your signing key requires active authority. Ensure you have the corresponding private key on your witness node before updating the public signing key, otherwise your node will miss blocks.

details.noVotes: No votes found for this witness

Proposals.description: Fund community-driven ideas through the Steem Proposal System (SPS). Vote on initiatives that improve the ecosystem and benefit the network.

publicKeys.description: These are your public keys on the Steem blockchain. You can share these keys publicly.

recovery.description: The recovery account can help you recover your account if it's compromised.
recovery.note: Note: Changing your recovery account is a secure operation that takes 30 days to complete. You will need your OWNER key to authorize this change.
